entries.translation: Заключённый вырыл яму под тюремной стеной.

entries.word: Every nunnery has its own rules.
entries.translation: Каждый женский монастырь имеет свои собственные правила.

entries.word: You need to follow the rules.
You shouldn't judge a person by what he wears.
entries.translation: Не следует судить человека по тому, как он одет.

entries.word: That crime is punishable by death.
I'm not a criminal.
They were all guilty.
It's not against the law.
That's not a crime.
Are they going to arrest you?
It was evident to all of us that he was innocent.
entries.translation: Нам всем было очевидно, что он невиновен.

entries.word: We need a lawyer.
Is Tom being charged with a crime?
Tom witnessed the murder.
It was a crime of passion.
The judge gave Tom 30 years.
Tom says that Mary is innocent.
Tom didn't know the rules.
When is it OK to break rules?
Tom looked very guilty.
Tom wants to call his lawyer.
Tom would make a good lawyer.
entries.translation: Из Тома вышел бы хороший адвокат.

entries.word: Tom is innocent.
The law is clear.
This is an ancient law.
Every crime must be punished.
Why did you steal your grandmother's jewelry?
entries.translation: Почему ты украл драгоценности своей бабушки?

entries.word: Tom is Mary's father-in-law.
He was hanged for murder.
I heard of his involvement in crime.
entries.translation: Я слышал о его криминальной деятельности.

entries.word: That law is full of ambiguities.
We were innocent.
They found him guilty.
Tom was breaking the rules.

entries.translation: Я не хочу, чтобы Том сел в тюрьму.

entries.word: We're investigating Tom Jackson's murder.
I didn't know what we were doing wasn't legal.
entries.translation: Я не знал, что то, что мы делаем, незаконно.

entries.word: Tom was found guilty of first-degree murder.
entries.translation: Тома признали виновным в убийстве первой степени.

entries.word: Tom convinced Mary that John was innocent.
entries.translation: Том убедил Мэри в невиновности Джона.

entries.word: Obey the law.

Tom tried to steal my girlfriend from me.
entries.translation: Том пытался увести у меня девушку.

entries.word: Tom is a really good lawyer.
